body:
Aunt Nancy, December 19 weekend works, I will take the train up Friday evening. Tell Dad I am in for the shepherd's pie and the talking.

Kelly
subject: Re: Boston weekend

body:
Hi, following up on the reminder. Could I get on the schedule for my annual physical the week of March 30? Late afternoon after 4 is easiest with my caseload. Happy to call the front desk if that is simpler.

Kelly Nelson
subject: Re: Annual physical reminder

body:
Marcus, you did not have to do that, but thank you. I have been meaning to read it for a year. I will grab it from the salon this weekend and I owe you a coffee at the Park Street shop.

Kelly
subject: Re: That book

body:
Derek, tightened opening is almost there, I moved the 12-case number into the first line like we said. I will send the full caseload-cap section before the coalition call so it is ready for the November 19 testimony. Looping the HFF inbox so Sarah can pull a quote for the gala deck.

Kelly
subject: Re: Case for Kids - your section

body:
Sarah, one more thing on the Lighting the Way save-the-date before Monday, can you swap in the hartfordfosterfutures.org tickets link instead of the flyer image so the page does the work? Derek and I want everything pointing there for the October 17 gala.

Kelly
subject: Re: Gala post for your approval
